@@ -544,2 +544,4 @@
-                    if (params != null &&
-                            ss.namedGroup == NamedGroup.valueOf(params)) {
+                    // RFC 8446 Section 4.2.3: TLS 1.2 signature scheme curve
+                    // doesn't have to match the signing curve.
+                    if (params != null && (!version.useTLS13PlusSpec()
+                            || ss.namedGroup == NamedGroup.valueOf(params))) {
